heading: Deductions by Chief Administrative Officer in disbursement of gratuity appropriations
label: 4560 Deductions by Chief Administrative Officer in disbursement of gratuity appropriations
text: The Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives is authorized, in the disbursement of gratuity appropriations, to make deductions of such amounts as may be due to or through his office or as may be due the House of Representatives.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 80a of this title
Amendments1996— substituted “Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives” for “Sergeant-at-Arms of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives” for “Sergeant-at-Arms of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
